case_title: ANDERS ERIK LOVEN-HOLT VS. THE CITY AND COUNTYOF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOVEN-HOLT, ANDERS ERIK AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LOVEN-HOLT, ANDERS ERIK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANDERS ERIK LOVEN-HOLT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S REPRESENTATIVE BRIAN CAULEY. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROPER SERVICE OF PROCESS/TIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOVEN-HOLT, ANDERS ERIK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,075.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
